title: BEYBLADE X
synonyms: ベイブレードエックス
synopsis: Bird Kazami, aiming to become a pro Blader, meets former champion Ekusu Kurosu, also known as 'Kamen X', and forms a team so that they can aim for the "top" of the X Tower. But what awaits them is a spectacular battle that no one has ever seen before. The yet unseen 'X'. The super accelerated (Xtreme) Beyblade runs through a new era! (Source: Official website)

synopsis: A third batch of the ●● no Mahou shorts released alongside the airing of the TV anime's second season, starting with #18. Posted on the official YouTube account of TOHO animation, Frieren Twitter, and Frieren TikTok account. Includes: • Mita Mono wo Kousoku Suru Mahou (見た者を拘束する魔法), released Jan 19, 2026. • Doushin ni Kaeru Mahou (童心に還る魔法), released Feb 2, 2026. • Kokoro to Karada ga Irekawaru Mahou (心と体が入れ替わる魔法), released Feb 17, 2026. • Osentaku no Mahou (お洗濯の魔法), released Mar 2, 2026. • Kangaeteiru Koto wo Itte Shimau Mahou Sono Ni (考えていることを言ってしまう魔法その2), released Mar 16, 2026.

synopsis: Ritsu inherited his sixth sense from his grandfather, along with a demon guardian named Blue Storm. Strange things just seem to happen around these two, and it's left to them to get to the bottom of all these mysterious events. Each story is independent but features recurring characters you'll come to know and appreciate as they, each in their own way, try to deal with things 'not of this world'. (Source: MU)

title: Komekami! Girls
synopsis: This is the story of the seven-sister unit "Komekami! Girls," children of the rice deity, born from the tradition: "In a single grain of rice, seven gods reside." When their mother (the deity of rice, or the rice-god queen) was called back in haste to the celestial realm and no longer able to return to the earthly realm they search for her traces using Usa City (Oita Prefecture) as their base, and teleport to Hachiman shrines throughout Kyushu island. As they solve local problems, they learn about food, take part in cooking battles, and grow.

title: Way of Choices
synopsis: Chen Changsheng, a young man of mysterious origins, is prophesied to die before the age of twenty due to his unique constitution. Determined to defy fate, he follows his master’s orders and travels to the Divine Capital of the human realm with a marriage contract in hand. His goal is to win first place in the highest-level Grand Imperial Examination, thereby earning the right to enter the Tomb of Heavenly Books to study the steles and seek a way to extend his life. In the Divine Capital, the marriage contract draws him into complex power struggles involving the Saintess Xu Yourong. Soon, an even greater crisis emerges: the forces of the demon race begin stirring in secret, plotting to overthrow the human race. Relying on his vast knowledge, Chen Changsheng makes his debut at the Ivy Banquet, then goes on to claim first place in the Grand Imperial Examination, gaining entry to the Tomb of Heavenly Books. There, he not only comprehends profound cultivation techniques but also uncovers a

title: Xuan Jie Zhi Men
synopsis: In a world where warriors are respected, Shi Mu's fate seems destined to be different. As the adopted son of an aristocratic family, he is forced to embark on the road of a warrior to find the truth and redeem himself. From the four halls of Fengcheng to the struggle between sects, interests are entangled, and powerful enemies lurk. Every challenge makes Shi Mu more determined. In the end, Shi Mu realizes the power of his bloodline, which not only changes his own destiny, but also affects the future of many people. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN
titleRomaji: Hokuto no Ken: FIST OF THE NORTH STAR
titleEnglish: FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN
titleNative: 北斗の拳 -FIST OF THE NORTH STAR-
synonyms: El puño de la Estrella del Norte: HOKUTO NO KEN
synopsis: In the year 199X, the world is engulfed in a nuclear inferno! The seas have vanished. The earth lies in ruins. It seems all life has been wiped out...but humanity has not perished! Across the scorched and broken land, survivors cling to hope, desperately searching for food and water. However, their hopes are trampled underfoot by violence. Might makes right in this world, and the weak are crushed without mercy. From the depths of that despair, a lone man with seven scars on his chest emerges. His name is Kenshiro, heir to the legendary assassination art Hokuto Shinken. As he roams the wasteland in pursuit of his sworn enemy Shin, who stole his fiancée Yuria, Kenshiro answers the cries of the oppressed, becoming a beacon of hope in a world of despair. Standing in his path are brutal survivors of the apocalypse, their ambitions twisted by power and greed. In a world where the weak are prey and prayers go unheard, Kenshiro forges a path with his iron fists! (Source: Official Website)

title: Sazae-san
synopsis: The main character is a mother named Sazae-san. She lives in a house with her husband, her kid, her siblings and her parents. The show is the ultimate family program and tends to follow traditional themes. Think of this show as the Japanese equivalent to "The Partridge Family" and you'll get a good feel for this show's atmosphere. Don't expect to see things like violence, swearing, kung-fu action or magical girls. The plots are more like "Today, Sazae-san goes to the new mall and gets lost". Such "boring" plotlines and the simplistic art are often a turn-off to non-Japanese audiences, but most Japanese find the show incredibly good. As a result, it continues to be one of the top ratings grabbers on TV and is one of the few anime that is considered "acceptable" by adults.

title: Soul Land 2: The Peerless Tang Clan
titleEnglish: Soul Land 2: The Peerless Tang Clan
synonyms: Soul Land 2: The Unrivaled Tang Sect
synopsis: The Tang Sect in a turbulent world. There is nothing but martial spirit here. Ten thousand years after the founding of the Tang Sect, it is in relative decline. An extremely talented man was born. Can the new Shrek Seven Monsters revive the Tang Sect and bring it back to glory? A soul beast of over one million years old; Electrolux who can pick stars; The new soul utensil system that led to the decline of the Tang Sect... A lot of secrets are to be revealed. Can the secret weapons of the Tang Sect be sharp again? Can the Tang Sect regain its former glory? (Source: WeTV)
